meta.title: Eddie Chang | Co-CEO, KinoLights
meta.description: From patent attorney to VC director to content company Co-CEO. Eddie Chang's career story and vision.

hero.name: Eddie Chang
hero.title: Co-CEO, KinoLights
hero.tagline: A life where the journey is the reward. A career where judgment deepens.
hero.sub: Patent Attorney → VC Director → Content Company Co-CEO. At every turn, he chose deeper judgment.

about.oneLiner: He observed, he understood, and then he jumped in.
about.p1: Some people sprint toward a destination. Others find meaning in every step of the road. Eddie Chang is the latter.
about.p2: Whether studying at the intersection of law and technology as a patent attorney, analyzing hundreds of startups as a venture capitalist, or joining the company he invested in three times as co-CEO — each phase was a complete experience in itself.
about.p3: "The journey itself is the reward." This phrase carries the weight of intense immersion rather than casual optimism.

items.copy: Distilling technology into language, he developed the eye for true value.
items.detail: Double-majored in Earth & Environmental Sciences and Mechanical Engineering at Seoul National University, then earned his patent attorney license. Analyzed thousands of patents to internalize which innovations create defensible moats and which can fundamentally reshape markets. Learned to distill the essence of technology into precise language and witnessed how innovation collides and negotiates in real markets.

items.copy: He learned to read the future through the grammar of finance.
items.detail: Reading business plans, building financial models, sizing markets — he learned the foundational grammar of venture capital. Where his patent attorney years gave him the eye for technological value, this period added the investor's holistic ability to evaluate market timing, scale, and team execution. From protecting technology to betting on technology — a natural expansion of perspective.

items.copy: Through high-density investing, he illuminated founders' blind spots.
items.detail: Joined Kakao Ventures as Investment Director and led dozens of early-stage investments over four years and seven months. Rather than casting a wide net, he embedded deeply in each investment — refining business models with founders, discussing hiring strategies, and sometimes joining customer interviews in person. His investment philosophy crystallized: 'A great investor doesn't just provide capital — they illuminate the blind spots that founders cannot see.'

items.copy: Three investments of conviction, now proven through hands-on leadership.
items.detail: An OTT aggregation and content recommendation platform. From a ₩300M seed round to a ₩2B Series A and follow-on — for a VC to invest in the same company three times means conviction that goes far beyond a positive assessment. With a team of 21, pursuing the grand vision of commanding the entire content value chain — from IP sourcing to distribution and viewing.

vision.quote: Building a company that commands the entire content value chain.
vision.sub: IP Sourcing → Distribution → Viewing. KinoLights encompasses it all.

chain.title: IP Sourcing
chain.desc: Securing intellectual property — webtoons, web novels, scripts

chain.title: Distribution
chain.desc: Producing and distributing content as dramas, films, animations

chain.title: Viewing
chain.desc: The discovery hub across OTT platforms through aggregation & recommendation

interests.title: Digital Assets
interests.desc: The future of ownership and finance

philosophy.quote: Through diverse experiences and sound thinking, becoming a wise person who makes better judgments.
philosophy.description: He learned to judge technology as a patent attorney, businesses as a VC, and people as a CEO. Each transition added a new axis to his decision-making, and at the intersection of those axes, his choices grow increasingly refined.

contact.headline: Let's Talk
contact.description: Whether it's about the future of the content value chain, the intersection of AI and content, or making better judgments — I'd love to connect.
